packageRules.description: Group Ruff bumps so a new rule under extend-select=ALL lands as one reviewable PR, not a surprise red.

customManagers.description: Pinned release binaries by a `# renovate:`-annotated *_VERSION env var (trivy, osv-scanner, hawkeye, taplo, kubeconform). Renovate bumps the version; the adjacent *_SHA256 is refreshed by scripts/refresh-binary-checksums.sh, run as a postUpgradeTask (below) so the fix lands in Renovate's own commit, since github-releases exposes no asset-digest datasource.
